query: SELECT id, status, title, progressStep, progressPercent FROM videos WHERE status IN ('generating_visuals', 'generating_script', 'generating_voiceover', 'awaiting_approval') OR (status = 'pending' AND title IS NULL) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
